Thought at pricing page: If I have to sign up just to see the prices, I’m out. Transparency is non-negotiable.
Thought when they see social proof: These reviews mentioning portability and setup ease are exactly what I need.
Thought when navigation is confusing: This site is a mess. I don’t have time to figure out where things are.
Thought at signup form: If this requires too much personal info upfront, I’m abandoning the process.
Thought when they find what they're looking for: This product could automate 10+ hours of my week—worth every penny.
